title: Healthcare Digital Wins 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award for Nutrition AI, Developed in Collaboration with Morrison Healthcare
body: Healthcare Digital, the healthcare and senior living division of Compass Digital and the technology arm for Compass Healthcare , today announced it has been named a winner in the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Awards, in the category of Augmented Intelligence for its Nutrition AI solution.

title: Apple may let Siri use AI models like Gemini and Claude with iOS 27 update
body: Apple is reportedly planning to allow Siri to work with third-party AI models like Gemini and Claude. The feature could arrive with iOS 27 and may be previewed at WWDC 2026.

title: Meta, Entergy announce massive expansion at Louisiana AI data center
body: Entergy plans seven new natural gas plants for Meta's Louisiana data center, confirming a massive AI project expansion.

title: CrowdStrike Slides 7% Today as AI Rivals Intensify Pressure
body: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) stock is sliding hard this morning. CRWD shares are down 7% on Friday, trading around $365 after opening at $392.62. That puts the stock in uncomfortable territory for investors who were hoping the cybersecurity giant's most recent earnings report would reignite momentum.

title: Apple Plans to Open Up Siri to Rival AI Assistants in iOS 27 Update
body: Apple Inc. plans to open Siri to outside artificial intelligence assistants, a major move aimed at bolstering the iPhone as an AI platform.

body: Unisound (09678.HK) announced its audited annual results for the year ended December 31, 2025. As the Company's first annual results announcement since listing, it underscores strong growth momentum and continued improvement in its financial profile.

title: Faculty Push Back Against OpenAI Deals
body: As higher ed institutions pay tech companies millions to provide students and faculty access to custom AI-powered tools, some faculty in Colorado and California are pushing back.

title: Tech stocks today: Big Tech stocks sell off, Anthropic considers IPO as soon as Q4
body: Tech stocks continued to be pressured on Friday after a sell-off in social media stocks and chip stocks sent the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) index into a correction. Meanwhile, investors continue to evaluate Nvidia's AI offerings after the company unveiled new AI chips and an agentic AI platform at its developer conference last week.

title: Anthropic's Claude faces major outage till date, services disrupted for nearly five hours
body: Anthropic Outage: The incident, which lasted for nearly five hours, is one of the longest for the platform. While users reported widespread issues with the Claude API and models such as Opus 4.6, Claude for Government remained largely unaffected.

title: Chat GPT creators shut down 'mind-blowing' app after 1 year marking 'end of an era'
body: Chat GPT creators OpenAI have discontinued a "mind-blowing" video app just over a year after it was first released in the UK. Sora is a programme that uses AI (artificial intelligence) to create short video clips based on user prompts. It was first launched back in December 2024, before being released in the UK in February 2025.

title: OpenAI Adds Plugin Marketplace to Codex
body: OpenAI has launched a plugin system for Codex, its AI coding agent, adding a curated directory of integrations that connect the tool to workplace apps including Slack, Notion, Figma, Gmail, and Google Drive.

title: Google Gemini now lets you import your chats and data from other AI apps

body: Gemini's new "import memory" tool lets you bring your chat history and personal info over from other AI chatbots, making migration easier.

title: 「え…24億円ってヤバすぎる」「想像を超える金額すぎて非現実感がヤバい」と驚きの声続出。堀江貴文氏、サービス終了した動画 ...
body: 堀江氏、Soraのサービス終了に言及 実業家の堀江貴文氏が3月25日に自身のXを更新。 投稿では米OpenAIが手掛ける動画生成AI「Sora」のサービス終了というニュースに触れ、率直な心境を明かしています。 「Sora」を巡っては、映像クオリティが話題を呼ぶ一方で、SNS上では堀江氏をモチーフにした生成動画が拡散される事態となっていました。

body: YE DIGITAL（YEデジタル）は25日、教員の業務軽減を目的とした生成AI活用支援機能を、2027年1月に提供開始予定であることを発表した。 同機能は、YEデジタルがこれまで提供してきた、安全・快適なネットワーク環境を支える学校ネットワークアクセス管理装置「NetSHAKER W-NAC」の標準機能として提供する予定。 学校現場では、教員の業務負担が年々増加する一方で、「働き方改革」の観点か

title: 生成AI校歌、全国初完成 4月開校の桑名市「多度学園」 三重

title: ケツメイシ 楽曲×最新の音声生成AIの初プロジェクト 曲紹介を"AI大蔵"が読み上げる「ケツメイシの ＃それでは聴いてください ...
body: ３人組ラップグループ・ケツメイシが、２７日から最新の音声生成ＡＩ技術を活用したプロジェクト「ケツメイシの　＃それでは聴いてください」を公開した。 また、全８曲から好きな曲を選んだ上で、ケツメイシの楽曲との思い出、「あの人」に伝えたかった言葉、ちょっとした 大喜利 など、自由なメッセージを入力するだけで、オリジナルムービーが作成される。
